text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The momentous occasion is finally<n>upon us! The
Tokyo Yushun, the<n>Japanese Derby, the race of all
races!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today, the Umamusume most<n>blessed by the
heavens shall be<n>revealed! What joy! What bliss!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But, do I really have to run? I'm<n>already taking on
the role of oracle,<n>so...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm kidding, really! I'm all fired up,<n>you know!
Plus, I need to keep my<n>promise to Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My sister was great, but Suzuka is<n>like, ten times
more capable than<n>even her. She's like ten sisters
rolled<n>into one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But that's not going to stop me from<n>beating her!

...Is what I wish I was cool enough to<n>say. But I'll
put on a brave face and<n>give it my all, at least.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I usually get by on luck, so I should<n>be able to put
on a good race for you,<n>Trainer.
choice_data_list: All right! Show everyone what you can do!
All right! Show everyone what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! My warding spells are all set to<n>protect me
from this monster of a<n>race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I am a blessed Uma, a veritable<n>picture of good
health! I vow to carry<n>myself to the finish line and
accomplish my goals!
